name: Insecure Storage of Sensitive Information
description: The product stores sensitive information without properly restricting read or write access to unauthorized parties. If read access is unrestricted, attackers can steal the data; if write access is unrestricted, they can modify or delete it, causing integrity violations and potential denial of service.
detection_pattern: TRANSFORM or EGRESS node writes data from STORAGE[sensitive] to STORAGE[persistent] without an AUTH[access_control] node enforcing proper read/write permissions, or without a TRANSFORM[encryption] node protecting the data at rest
